title: rosa mollissima var. mollis
intro: Rosa mollissima var. mollis, also known as the downy rose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Rosa mollissima var. mollis include its ability to promote digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and lower blood pressure, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
